title: lyonia ovalifolia var. elliptica
intro: Lyonia ovalifolia var. elliptica, also known as elliptical fawn's breath, is a variety of the Lyonia ovalifolia plant, a flowering shrub native to North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help to reduce pain and combat infections. The health benefits of Lyonia ovalifolia var. elliptica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
